## Riot Relay 1.4.0

This release improves friend activity detail, keeps friend avatars and profile links available while offline, fixes unread chat messages reappearing after switching accounts, and adds a dismissible in-app update banner.

### Friend activity
- VALORANT presence now surfaces live match score, party size/leader status, custom-game spectating, match-found/custom-setup phases, and away state, instead of only a generic phase label.
- League presence now surfaces party size and Clash scouting/locked-in status alongside champion and queue.
- All new fields are decoded from Riot's own local presence data with the same bounded, allowlisted parsing as existing fields; no new external calls are made.

### Friend avatars and profile links
- Friend avatars and verified League platform (used to build OP.GG/U.GG/DeepLoL/DPM.LOL links) are now retained in memory for the session once observed, so they no longer disappear the moment a friend leaves an active game or goes offline.
- This cache is cleared on every account switch, matching existing chat session isolation.

### Chat unread state
- Fixes previously read messages reappearing as unread after switching accounts and back.
- Per-identity read/seen state is now retained in memory for the session (bounded to recent identities) instead of being fully discarded on every switch.
- A genuinely new message arriving after switching back is still correctly flagged unread.

### Update experience
- Adds a dismissible banner under the title bar that appears automatically when an update is available, downloading, or ready to install, with its own progress bar and install button.
- The existing detailed Settings panel is unchanged; this is an additional, more visible surface for the same update service.

### Validation
- All 78 automated tests pass.
- JavaScript syntax checks, diagnostics, and diff checks pass.
- Temporary logic repros confirmed VALORANT score/party extraction and unread-state persistence across simulated account switches (removed after passing).
- Windows x64 NSIS and MSI release artifacts are built by the tagged release workflow.

### Downloads
- **EXE / NSIS:** recommended for normal installation and automatic updates.
- **MSI:** intended for managed or manual deployment.
- `SHA256SUMS.txt` contains SHA-256 hashes for published assets.

Riot Relay is unofficial community software and is not endorsed by Riot Games.
